title: Big Trouble in Little Chimney
description:
Krampus is Coming! Grab your shotgun, finish your hot punch and don't forget your mission: Save the Christmas! Big Trouble in Little Chimney is highly-addictive and fast paced arena bullet-hell shooter.

Survive endless hordes of creatures lurk from the dark chimney and save the Christmas!

Features:

• Simple controls and pure arcade action

• Quick 10 minute play sessions 

• Infinite replayability as you chase ever higher scores!

• Over 10 brutal enemy types like: Turkey, Gingerbread man, or Nutcracker

• Plenty of guns for fun: Shotgun, SMG or awesome Flamethrower for all BBQ lovers!

• Collect jingle bells and gain new upgrades as you progress

• Unlock New Weapons and special abilities in the Santa's Store

• 2 Game modes: Krampus is coming, Giftpocalypse

• Handcrafted pixel graphics created with love

• Great music by Kevin MacLeod

• Full Xbox 360 controller support

• Includes Steam Achievements and small green Elves!

Warning: This game contains a lot of Turkeys and elements of PIXEL violence :O
description_short: Krampus is Coming! Grab your Shotgun, finish your hot punch and don't forget your mission: Save the Christmas! Big Trouble in Little Chimney is highly-addictive and fast paced arena bullet-hell shooter.
